methods.name: createApplication
methods.desc: Called once on deploy.

methods.name: createSingleBox

args.name: size
args.desc: - byte length for the new box

returns.desc: true if the box was newly created

methods.desc: Demonstrate Box.create() — allocates storage for the box.

methods.name: setSingleBox

args.name: data
args.desc: - raw bytes to store in the box

methods.desc: Demonstrate Box .value setter and .exists check.

methods.name: getSingleBox

returns.desc: the box contents, or empty bytes if the box doesn't exist

methods.desc: Demonstrate Box .value getter and .get() with default.

methods.name: deleteSingleBox

returns.desc: true if the box existed and was deleted

methods.desc: Demonstrate Box .delete().

methods.name: checkSingleBox
methods.desc: Demonstrate Box .maybe() — returns [value, exists] tuple.

methods.name: extractFromBox
methods.desc: Demonstrate .extract() — read a slice of bytes from a box.

methods.name: replaceInBox
methods.desc: Demonstrate .replace() — overwrite bytes at a given offset.

methods.name: spliceBox

args.name: data
args.desc: - bytes to insert at the splice point

methods.desc: Demonstrate .splice() — insert/remove bytes at a given offset.

methods.name: resizeBox

args.name: newSize
args.desc: - desired byte length for the box

methods.desc: Demonstrate .resize() — grow or shrink a box.

methods.name: getBoxLength

returns.desc: the current byte length of the box

methods.desc: Demonstrate .length — get the byte length of a box.

methods.name: setEntry
methods.desc: Demonstrate BoxMap write — set a key-value pair.

methods.name: getEntry

args.name: key
args.desc: - the map key to look up

returns.desc: the stored bytes, or empty bytes if the key doesn't exist

methods.desc: Demonstrate BoxMap read — get a value by key.

methods.name: hasEntry

returns.desc: true if the key exists in the map

methods.desc: Demonstrate BoxMap .exists check.

methods.name: deleteEntry

returns.desc: true if the key existed and was deleted

methods.desc: Demonstrate BoxMap .delete().

methods.name: getEntryLength

returns.desc: the byte length of the keyed box

methods.desc: Demonstrate BoxMap .length on a specific entry.

methods.name: setDynamicState
methods.desc: Demonstrate dynamic GlobalState creation using runtime keys (requires stateTotals to reserve slots).

methods.name: getDynamicState

args.name: key
args.desc: - the global state key to read

methods.desc: Read a dynamic global state value.

methods.name: deleteDynamicState

args.name: key
args.desc: - the global state key to remove

methods.desc: Delete a dynamic global state key.

methods.name: testBoxRoundTrip

args.name: data
args.desc: - raw bytes to round-trip through the box

methods.desc: End-to-end test combining multiple box operations with assertions.
